name: codearts-bar
description: CodeArts Bar: desktop tray app, VS Code/CodeArts status extension, and CLI for local CodeArts Agent usage.

scripts.test: npm run build:renderer && node tests/run-tests.js && node tests/dashboard-renderer-smoke.js && node tests/chart-axis-smoke.js && node tests/cli-bin-smoke.js && npm run build:npm-package && node tests/npm-package-smoke.js && node tests/source-encoding-smoke.js && node tests/date-range-state-smoke.js && node tests/electron-security-smoke.js && node tests/extension-package-smoke.js && node tests/extension-webview-smoke.js && node tests/extension-refresh-smoke.js && node tests/dashboard-style-smoke.js && node tests/dashboard-css-budget-smoke.js && node tests/settings-store-smoke.js && node tests/db-watch-service-smoke.js && node tests/app-runtime-smoke.js && node tests/i18n-smoke.js && node tests/dashboard-preview-smoke.js && node tests/database-diagnostics-smoke.js && node tests/crash-reporter-smoke.js && node tests/release-manifest-smoke.js && node tests/release-artifacts-smoke.js && node src/cli.js self-test
scripts.build:app: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:cli-resources && npm run build:app-resources && electron-builder --projectDir .cache/app-runtime --config ../../electron-builder.runtime.js --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run e2e:electron:built && npm run e2e:vscode && npm run stress:dashboard && npm run stress:pagination && npm run stress:aggregation
scripts.pack:npm: npm run build:npm-package && npm pack .cache/npm-package --pack-destination release
scripts.test:visual: npm run screenshot:vscode && npm run screenshot:electron && node tests/visual-regression.js
scripts.update:visual-baselines: npm run screenshot:vscode && npm run screenshot:electron && node tests/update-visual-baselines.js
scripts.verify:ci: npm test && npm run e2e:vscode && npm run stress:dashboard && npm run stress:pagination && npm run stress:aggregation && npm run screenshot:vscode:prepared && npm run screenshot:electron:built && node tests/visual-regression.js
scripts.build:app:built: npm run build:cli-resources && npm run build:app-resources && electron-builder --projectDir .cache/app-runtime --config ../../electron-builder.runtime.js --win nsis portable --x64

author: CodeArts Bar
